full faction-specific mechanics and balance remain scheduled for later faction-content phases
technology, effect and incomplete UI-state artwork still uses procedural CSS or SVG fallback
current production UI is still the pre-redesign prototype until PR #64-#70 migrate screens
bot scheduler cursor is runtime-only and restarts its decision window after reload
existing schema-v12 saves are not retroactively seeded with pirate bases
autonomous bots do not yet launch expeditions or space-object operations
bots do not yet prioritize damaged defense repair
exotic matter is stored but does not yet have spending mechanics
world events currently use four base scenarios without player-choice branches

ship upgrade branch agent/pr63-ship-upgrades is intentionally not merged during visual redesign
